'''Ardax''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] who served as second-in-command to the [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Furgan]]. He also commanded the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] [[Vendetta (Dreadnaught-class)|''Vendetta'']]. Ardax was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when the ''Vendetta'' was destroyed during the [[Battle of Anoth (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Anoth]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Ardax was created by author [[Kevin J. Anderson]].
